title: CrabLaw-CN AI Use Case
description: Inventory record for an AI/algorithmic use case under PRC AI governance rules (生成式AI服务管理办法 / 算法推荐管理规定 / 深度合成规定). Used by the ai-governance plugin and referenced by product and vendor-AI reviews. Impact-assessment findings are diligence-finding records; filing deadlines are compliance-deadline records.

deploymentContext.description: internal-tool=内部工具; customer-facing=面向客户; public-service=向公众提供服务; embedded-product=嵌入产品; vendor-provided=第三方/供应商提供; research=研究测试; other=其他

aiCategory.description: generative-text=生成式文本; generative-media=生成式图像/音视频; decision-support=决策辅助; automated-decision=自动化决策; recommendation=算法推荐; biometric=生物识别; other=其他

filingStatus.description: PRC AI filing posture. not-required=无需备案; required-not-filed=需备案未备案; algorithm-filed=算法备案已完成; deep-synthesis-filed=深度合成备案已完成; large-model-registered=生成式AI(大模型)上线登记已完成; other=其他

sourceRef.description: Pointer to the governing source; required when citationTag is [已核验-来源].
